properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
v2
verse.lines: Glory to His name! Glory to His name! There to my heart was the blood applied; Glory to His name!

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: I am so wondrously saved from sin, Jesus so sweetly abides within, There at the cross where He took me in: Glory to His name!

verse.name: v4
v5
